name: dungeon cell
hints: A dungeon cell with a star, an oak door, and an air shaft. You need to escape this cell.
GET STAR. The oak door is locked. The air shaft may be an escape route. Try the permeability spell on the door.
Use the permeability spell to pass through the oak door. The air shaft connects to the fountain area. GET STAR first.
notes: Dungeon cell with a *STAR*, locked oak door, and air shaft. The permeability spell allows passing through the door. The air shaft connects to the fountain system. Must escape through one of these routes.
